response.justification: While Bogdan meets the educational qualification threshold (BS Computer Science + 20 years experience) and has appropriate seniority level, his career is fundamentally misaligned with the Principal Performance Architect role. His expertise is in web and backend software development with no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware optimization, deep learning workload analysis, or GPU/accelerator architecture—all core requirements. Recent work on AI infrastructure at re:cinq is tangential and insufficient to bridge the significant technical gap.
strengths: 20+ years of professional software engineering experience and staff-level seniority appropriate for principal role
Demonstrated ability to optimize performance-critical systems (low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby with async I/O and caching)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure work and developer tooling at re:cinq shows some awareness of modern ML systems
concerns: Zero documented experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or any form of hardware-software co-design
No background in deep learning frameworks, neural network optimization, or ML workload analysis—required expertise for the role
Career trajectory entirely in web/backend services rather than systems architecture or hardware-focused infrastructure

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware design experience
Missing deep learning workload expertise and GPU architecture knowledge
Staff-level seniority meets organizational level requirements
